title: Caracal mob
description: This mod adds caracals to your world!
body:
This mod adds caracals to your world! They like to hunt chickens and rabbits and you can tame them with raw fish or chicken/rabbit meat. Also they spawns naturally in the savanna and have cute sounds! All nametags list

Model made by u/SociopathyKathy:
https://www.reddit.com/r/Minecraft/comments/kh6cm7/i_got_bored_and_decided_to_make_a_caracal/
